# Create Contact Record

This SOP describes the steps to create a new contact record in the CRM system.

## Prerequisites

- User must have a valid CRM account
- The website URL must be reachable: https://example.com
- authentication: tool

## Inputs Required

- {{input.website_url}} — the base URL of the CRM application
- {{input.email_address}} — email address of the new contact

## Steps

1. Open the CRM at {{input.website_url}}
2. Let the user complete login and MFA
3. Navigate to the Contacts section
4. Click the New Contact button
5. Fill in the email field with {{input.email_address}}
6. Click the Save button

## Conditional Logic

if login fails, retry up to 3 times before escalating
wait for the page to load before proceeding to the next step

## Deferred Capability

get_code will be created later once the authentication module is finalised

## Branch Paths

→ success_path
→ failure_path

## Notes

All steps must be executed in sequence. The user should not close the browser window during execution.
